sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 2011. Short title
(I) On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, Appropriation
sections.text:
there may be expended from the general revenues of the Republic,
such monies, not exceeding in the aggregate twenty-seven trillion,
six hundred and ninety-eight billion, two hundred and eighty-<me million,
nine hundred and twenty-nine thousand, eight hundred and thirty-
four kwacha, as may be required for the services of the Republic
during the financial year ending on 31st December, 2012.
(2) The moneys referred to in subsection (I) shall be
appropriated to the services of the Republic specified in the second
column of the schedule in amounts not exceeding the amounts
indicated in the third column of the Schedule.
(3) On the written authority of the Secretary to the Treasury,
• Ministry of Finance, the amounts shown under the sub-heads of
estimates may be varied:
I
Provided that-
(a) the amounts appropriated to each Head shall nottherepy
be altered; and
(b)any of the amounts shown under Head 20 or 21 shall
not be varied.
Single copies oft his Act may be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price KJ/,000
